levels.description: Guards actively asleep at their posts, missing or unconscious. 1 Success Level on Hide or Sneak attempts.
Guards bored and distracted: no special rules.
Guards are alert, but stationary: 1 Failure Level on Hiding or Sneak attempts.
Guards patrol, looking for intruders, but not expecting to find them: 2 Failure Levels on Hide or Sneak.
Guards are aware there is an intruder: 3 Failure Levels on hide or Sneak.
Intruder alarms are ringing: 5 Failure Levels on Hide or Sneak.
Strange auras around the mountain at night.
Pyroclastic flow engulfs your side of the volcano.
Tension None: Dominance is impossible without some Tension.
Low Tension: Active but limited displays of Dominance can occur.
Medium: Pressed side has at least one negative encounter with a representative of the Dominant Side.
High Tension: Embodiments appear in a Scene together. Demonstration of Dominance.
Open Conflict: The Dominant Embodiment focuses their attention and power on the Pressed Embodiment.
Tragic Conflict: Either or both Embodiments badly injured by the end of the Scene.
